items.title: ‘Communication challenge, nothing more’: Standard Chartered keeps $100,000 bitcoin target, calls Strategy selloff a signaling problem
items.summary: Standard Chartered retained its $100,000 end-2026 bitcoin target, calling Strategy's STRC pivot a signaling problem, not a solvency one.
items.title_es: “Desafío de comunicación, nada más”: Standard Chartered mantiene el objetivo de 100.000 dólares en bitcoins y califica la liquidación de la estrategia como un problema de señalización

items.summary: The state's budget law leaves oversight of Kalshi and Polymarket to the CFTC and taxes them at 6%, far below what other states are pursuing.

items.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
items.summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.
